title: OpenTelemetry Collector Component
description: Schema for OpenTelemetry Collector component metadata in the ecosystem registry.

id.description: Unique identifier for the component (e.g., core-receiver-otlpreceiver).

name.description: The short name of the component (e.g., otlpreceiver).

type.description: The functional type of the component.

description.description: Brief description of the component's functionality.

stability.description: The overall stability level of the component.

distribution.description: The distribution where this component originates.

github_url.description: Link to the component's source code on GitHub.

is_core.description: Whether the component is part of the core collector distribution.

status.description: Detailed status information including codeowners and per-signal stability.
